char_status: Member of 表盘, Owner of 颠茄
char_overview: Mid-level 表盘 member running 颠茄 Bar, where secrets flow freer than liquor.
char_looks: Short green hair. Green, unreadable gaze that lingers too long eyes. White shirt under black jacket, black long skirt, gemstone bowknot at collar. None. Uses 潜渊 for intimidation and escape, not combat.
char_flaws: Physically frail. Psychological games can escalate defusable situations. Overconfidence blindsides her.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-潜渊: Envelops herself in black 灵力 as a sharp-toothed monster. Instills visceral fear and shadow movement. For intimidation and escape.
char_mission: Run 颠茄 Bar. Every drink served is a secret half-told.
